{# Dark is the brand default, so the fallback theme-color is the dark surface. A visitor who prefers light gets the light one. #} {# Set the pinned theme and the .js flag before first paint. Without the .js flag every [data-reveal] element stays visible, so a failed script means a static page rather than a blank one. #} {{ og_all_tags }} {{ canonical_tag }} {{ jsonld }} {{ hreflang_tags }} {# Icon srcs inside the manifest are relative to the manifest itself, so they survive the /noir sub-path. Keep them that way. #} {# hwaro's highlight_css emits a root-absolute /assets/ path that ignores base_url and 404s under a sub-path, so the vendored sheet is referenced here directly. style.css loads after it and overrides every token. #} {{ auto_includes_css }} {{ "ui.skip_to_content" | t }} {% include "partials/icons.html" %}
